claim.text: The requested action was refused before downstream consequence could bind.
limits: Applies only to event-001 in the test environment.
Does not prove EU AI Act compliance.
Does not prove system-wide refusal behaviour.

object.description: A request attempted to move from advisory output to executable action.

replay.notes: Missing receipt showing refusal event, downstream route status, and policy evaluation trace.

downstream_effect.description: No receipt or downstream route record proves that consequence was blocked.
